data.body: 21dd + 36c7 CONFIRMED closed+completion-signed (2/5 done). 08a8 v2 re-review BLOCK: zizmor excessive-permissions false-positive on mcp_registry id-token:write (opaque shell cmd mcp-publisher login github-oidc). Remediated: AC now allows one annotated # zizmor:ignore[excessive-permissions] suppression (test asserts it verbatim, forbids others) + What note. Re-reviewing 08a8.
